insights.heading: Switch to a plant-based lunch three times a week
insights.saves: Saves up to 4.2 kg CO₂/week — 12.0% of your current footprint
insights.body: Your food footprint has been 38.0% above your target for the past 3 weeks.

insights.heading: Car pool or take transit for your daily commute
insights.saves: Saves up to 8.4 kg CO₂/week — 24.0% of your current footprint
insights.body: Your transport footprint is the single largest contributor to your environmental impact.

insights.heading: Unplug electronic devices when not in use
insights.saves: Saves up to 1.5 kg CO₂/week — 4.0% of your current footprint
insights.body: Standby power accounts for roughly 8.0% of your monthly household energy usage.

insights.heading: Opt for secondhand clothing items this month
insights.saves: Saves up to 6.2 kg CO₂/item — 18.0% of your current footprint
insights.body: New clothing production carries high manufacturing and transportation footprints.
